mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_air_emission ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_air_emission ORDER BY measurement_date DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_air_emission WHERE facility LIKE '%' + #{facility} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_air_emission WHERE facility LIKE '%' + #{facility} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_air_emission (measurement_date, facility, pollutant, emission_concentration, unit, emission_standard, compliance, manager, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{measurementDate}, #{facility}, #{pollutant}, #{emissionConcentration}, #{unit}, #{emissionStandard}, #{compliance}, #{manager}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_air_emission SET measurement_date = #{measurementDate}, facility = #{facility}, pollutant = #{pollutant}, emission_concentration = #{emissionConcentration}, unit = #{unit}, emission_standard = #{emissionStandard}, compliance = #{compliance}, manager = #{manager}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
